meta.title: Invoice Studio – Online invoicing for freelancers and small businesses
meta.description: Create professional invoices in seconds. Invoice Studio is the simple invoicing app for freelancers and small businesses. Start free, no subscription required.

og.title: Invoice Studio – Online invoicing for freelancers and small businesses
og.description: Create professional invoices in seconds. Start free, no subscription required.

hero.title: Professional invoices. Less administration.
hero.description: Invoice Studio helps you create invoices faster, follow up on payments, and track your revenue. All in a sleek platform that's immediately clear for you and your customers.

benefits.lessWork: Less manual work and fewer errors
benefits.fasterPaid: Get paid faster with clear, professional invoices
benefits.overview: Clear dashboard with immediate action points
benefits.easyToUse: Easy for beginners, powerful enough for growth

features.title: What you can do with the platform
features.subtitle: All core features you need to organize invoicing professionally and clearly.

invoicesInMinutes.title: Invoices in minutes
invoicesInMinutes.description: Create professional invoices with automatic totals, VAT calculations, and clear formatting for your customers.

smartCustomerManagement.title: Smart customer management
smartCustomerManagement.description: Store customer data centrally and reuse it directly for every new invoice without duplicate work.

realtimeInsight.title: Always realtime insight
realtimeInsight.description: See at a glance which invoices are outstanding, paid, and where your revenue is coming from today.

quickImport.title: Quick import and editing
quickImport.description: Import existing invoices, quickly update details, and keep your administration neat and consistent.

fasterPayment.title: Get paid faster
fasterPayment.description: Send clear invoices with transparent payment information so customers understand and pay faster.

growthReady.title: Growth-ready platform
growthReady.description: From starter to growing business: your workflows stay fast, clear, and scalable.

useCases.title: Use cases in view
useCases.subtitle: Clear, clean previews of how your team uses Invoice Studio daily.

newInvoice.title: Create new invoice
newInvoice.description: From customer selection to send-ready invoice in just a few steps.

dashboard.title: Dashboard and follow-up
dashboard.description: See immediately which invoices need action and where revenue is growing.

import.title: Import and check
import.description: Import existing invoices and correct data where needed.

trust.title: Trusted by entrepreneurs
trust.subtitle: Made for freelancers and small businesses who want to invoice quickly.

quickStart.title: Quick to start
quickStart.description: Send your first invoice within minutes.

growsWithYou.title: Grows with you
growsWithYou.description: Start free and upgrade only when you want.

blog.title: Smart tips for entrepreneurs who want to spend less time on administration
blog.description: Not just software, but also useful knowledge. Read how entrepreneurs organize their invoicing tighter, better monitor cashflow, and get paid faster without extra hassle.

article.title: How entrepreneurs really save hours on administration while maintaining control over their cashflow
article.description: A practical article for freelancers and small businesses about invoicing faster, better following up on outstanding invoices, and working smarter without making your administration heavier.
article.bullet1: Less manual work with recurring invoices.
article.bullet2: More overview of outstanding amounts and payment moments.
article.bullet3: Better foundation for stable cashflow and less stress.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Short answers to the questions we get most from starters and freelancers.

free.question: Is Invoice Studio really free to use?
free.answer: Yes. You can start with the Free plan without credit card. You only pay when you choose Pro.

upgrade.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
upgrade.answer: Certainly. You can upgrade to Pro at any time or later switch back to Free.

firstInvoice.question: How quickly can I send my first invoice?
firstInvoice.answer: Usually within minutes. Fill in your profile, add a customer, and create your first invoice right away.

security.question: Are my invoices and customer data safe?
security.answer: Yes. Data is securely stored and only used for your invoicing process.

mobile.question: Does this work on mobile?
mobile.answer: Yes, the interface is responsive and works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

cta.title: Ready to invoice smarter?
cta.description: Start free, immediately experience the difference in speed and overview, and scale along as your business grows.

referralTest.title: Test referral (dev)
referralTest.description: 1) Login with account A 2) open referral page and copy/open your link 3) register account B via that link.
